title: feat: weekly model-changes report -> news branch + Discord
author: Itachi-1824

gist.headline: Model radar activated
gist.blurb: Added an automated weekly tracker to keep tabs on all the new AI models joining the hive. Now we can automatically announce fresh models to Discord without lifting a finger.
gist.summary: Implemented a weekly cron job that snapshots model endpoints, diffs changes, and automatically posts AI-formatted updates to Discord.
gist.impact: This automates model announcements, ensuring the community stays up-to-date on new text, image, audio, and embedding models without manual tracking.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee acting as a news reporter or radar operator. A cute chunky robot with a monitor head displaying a list of models or a radar screen.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny newsboy cap, holding a freshly printed list of AI models. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby, its screen displaying a glowing radar sweep. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny newsboy cap, holding a freshly printed list of AI models. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby, its screen displaying a glowing radar sweep. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
